description_long: This is a medium-sized kitchen knife with a straight, single-edged blade featuring a serrated section along the cutting edge. The blade is metallic, dark in color, and has a matte to slightly glossy finish, indicating it is likely made of stainless steel. The handle is straight, constructed from a dark wood or composite material, and is attached to the blade with two visible rivets. The handle has a simple, utilitarian design with a smooth surface and no visible ergonomic contouring or decorative elements. The knife is well-suited for slicing bread or other foods requiring a serrated edge, and its robust construction suggests it is intended for regular kitchen use. There is no guard or ornamentation present, and the object is not accompanied by a sheath.
description: A medium-sized, serrated kitchen knife with a dark metallic blade and a simple, riveted wooden handle. The design is utilitarian and lacks ornamentation or a guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the serrated blade and the straight, riveted handle.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the width of the blade and the flat end of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade's serrations and the handle's attachment rivets.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the blade's thickness and the handle's end profile.
attribute_handle_design: straight, dark wood or composite, two rivets, smooth surface
